title: MTR Universal Intercoupling Pack
description: An MTR resource pack that adds intercoupling vehicles for all vehicles within MTR Resource Packs.
body:
Adds all the intercouplings from any resource packs as requested from original creators for the most compatibility between any vehicle from all resource packs of Minecraft Transit Railway

Please note the couplers before choosing the intercoupling you would like to use. Left most coupler named in the intercoupling vehicle is for the vehicle listed above and the RIght most coupler named is for the vehicle listed below.

Please DM "l_kao" on Discord if you would like your coupler to be added and all variants necessary will be made for use as intercouplings within this resource pack.
<details>
<summary>Couplers</summary>
  
- Dellner
- Vac-Grip
- Hook & Chain
- MCH-44
- AAR

</details>
